name: list seed tickets
question_or_action: GET /tickets
key_assertions: Returns 200 and exactly 25 seed tickets when runtime store is empty.

name: create runtime ticket
question_or_action: POST /tickets
key_assertions: Creates a runtime ticket from API payload and returns 201 with TICKET-0026.

name: idempotent API ticket create
question_or_action: POST /tickets
key_assertions: Repeating the same idempotencyKey returns the existing ticket instead of creating another.

name: prevent duplicate API ticket
question_or_action: GET /tickets
key_assertions: Only one runtime ticket exists for idempotencyKey api-test-delivery-help.

name: inspect created ticket
question_or_action: GET /tickets/{ticket_id}
key_assertions: Created runtime ticket can be fetched by ID with status 200.

name: filter tickets
question_or_action: GET /tickets?status=open&priority=high&productId=B0BYBG1PPD
key_assertions: Filters isolate the created high-priority open shipping ticket for product B0BYBG1PPD.

name: update runtime ticket
question_or_action: PATCH /tickets/{ticket_id}
key_assertions: Runtime ticket status changes to in_progress and internal note is appended.

name: missing ticket error
question_or_action: GET /tickets/TICKET-9999
key_assertions: Unknown ticket ID returns 404.

name: seed ticket update blocked
question_or_action: PATCH /tickets/TICKET-0001
key_assertions: Attempting to update a read-only seed ticket returns 400.

name: chat-created ticket
question_or_action: POST /chat with createTicket=true
key_assertions: Confirmed contact-request handoff creates TICKET-0027.

name: idempotent chat ticket retry
question_or_action: POST /chat with same ticketRequestId
key_assertions: Retrying the same chat ticket request returns the existing ticket and does not duplicate it.

name: block ticket creation for normal answer
question_or_action: POST /chat with createTicket=true for return-policy question
key_assertions: Normal non-handoff answers cannot create tickets and return 400.

name: production frontend build
question_or_action: npm run build
